vegan-chocolate-banana-pudding.name: Vegan Chocolate Banana Pudding
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Place soybeans in a blender; add water, a little at a time, and blend to pudding consistency.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Add chopped bananas and cocoa; blend until combined.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Transfer to a bowl. Garnish with walnuts in the center and banana slices around the edges.'}

vegan-green-lentil-curry.name: Vegan Green Lentil Curry
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook onion, bell pepper, and garlic until soft, about 5 minutes. Stir in garam masala, curry powder, cumin, and turmeric; cook until fragrant, 1 to 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, bring to a simmer, and cook for 5 minutes. Add lentils and stir well. Simmer for 10 minutes, but do not bring to a boil.

vegan-hearts-of-palm-ceviche.name: Vegan Hearts Of Palm Ceviche

ingredients.prep: seeded and minced, or to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place hearts of palm slices in a glass bowl. Add tomatoes, onion, cilantro, and serrano peppers.

Measure 3/4 cup hearts of palm juice into a bowl; discard remaining juice. Mix vinegar and olive oil into the bowl. Pour over hearts of palm mixture. Season with oregano, salt, and pepper. Garnish with olives and avocado slices.

vegan-lentil-sausage-recipe-comedera.name: Vegan Lentil Sausage Recipe
vegan-lentil-sausage-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de salchichas de lentejas veganas

ingredients.item: 1 taza de lentejas cocidas (pueden ser verdes o pardinas)
1/3 taza de avena en hojuelas finas
1/4 taza de nueces o semillas de girasol trituradas
1 pint of freshly ground black pepper
1 cda de aceite de oliva ((opcional, para dar jugosidad))
Agua (solo si la mezcla queda demasiado seca)
Papel film o papel encerado para moldear

instructions: Triple lentils with a fork or processor to form a thick purée. They should not be completely liquefied and a rustic texture helps the sausage have body.
Agrega la avena, la harina de garbanzo, las nueces trituradas, el ajo, la cebolla, la pasta de tomate y la salsa de soja. Mezcla bien.
Add all spices: cumin, paprika, oregano, pepper and salt. Incorporates the oil if you decide to use it.
Mix up to get a malleable but firm mass. If it's very dry, add a tablespoon of water and if it's very wet, a little more oatmeal or flour.
Divide mass into 4 equal parts. Put every portion onto a piece of film or waxed paper and give them cylindrical shape, as a sausage. Wrap and tighten the ends as if they were candy.
Cocina las salchichas al vapor durante 20 minutos para que se compacten y mantengan la forma. Este paso es clave para lograr una textura firme.
Once cooked, let them cool. You can put them in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or cook them immediately.
To serve, put them in a frying pan with some oil for about 5 minutes or till they are crispy from the outside.

vegan-mapo-tofu.name: Vegan Mapo Tofu
instructions: Mix vegetable broth, maple syrup, soy sauce, and cornstarch in a bowl.

Heat peanut oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms, black beans, green onions, garlic, ginger, and Sichuan peppercorns. Saute until aromatic, about 1 minute. Add chili bean paste and the soy sauce mixture. Cook and stir until thick, 3 to 5 minutes. Add tofu; cook until heated through, about 1 minute more.
Transfer cooked tofu to a serving dish; drizzle chile oil and sesame oil on top. Top with chopped peanuts.

vegan-spaghetti-with-minced-meat-argiro.name: Vegan Spaghetti With Minced Meat

ingredients.item: 1 small onion cut into very thin slices
1 small onion cut into very thin slices

instructions: Heat the oil in a wide pot.
Sauté the finely chopped onion for 2-3′ to become transparent, add the garage and sauce about 1 minute.
Add the paste and rub it in the pot to remove its aromas for 1’.
Add the tomatoes cut in half and sauce for 1’.
Add the chopped tomatoes and carrot.
Finally add the vegetable minced meat and mix with a spoon.
Add the pasta to the pot and pour it with the hot water.
Add the sparks salt and pepper and bottle over medium heat for 8’.
Allow the sparks, cinnamon and bay left to perfume the pasta for 2-3′′ and remove them.
We mix regularly.

vegetable-banh-mi.name: Vegetable Banh Mi

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Portobello mushrooms - stems and gills removed

instructions: Combine carrots, jicama, and onion in a small bowl.

Combine 1/2 cup vinegar, water, and sugar in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir until sugar dissolves, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and pour pickling liquid over the vegetables. Let sit for 30 minutes.

Whisk remaining 1/4 cup vinegar with fish sauce, soy sauce, sriracha, garlic powder, five-spice powder, salt, and pepper in a 10-inch sauté pan over medium heat. Bring to a boil for about 3 minutes. Lower heat to medium, add mushrooms, and cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Remove mushrooms from liquid with a slotted spoon.

Spread 1 tablespoon mayonnaise over each roll half. Divide mushrooms evenly over the two bottom halves. Drain pickled vegetables and divide evenly over mushrooms. Divide cucumber, jalapeño, and cilantro between the sandwiches. Add more sriracha if desired. Squeeze 1 lime wedge over filling of each sandwich and cover with top bun half.

vegetarian-mexican-lasagna.name: Vegetarian Mexican Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion, jalapenos, bell pepper, and garlic; cook and stir until onion is translucent, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and add salsa, black beans, corn, chili powder, and cumin. Bring to a simmer; let simmer for 5 minutes.
Combine 2 cups pepper Jack cheese, ricotta cheese, spinach, egg, salt, and pepper in a bowl.

Place 6 corn tortillas in the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Add 1/2 of the vegetable mixture using a slotted spoon, followed by 1/2 of the cheese and spinach mixture. Add a layer of 6 tortillas and follow with remaining vegetables and remaining cheese mixture. Top with remaining tortillas. Spread enchilada sauce across the top and remaining pepper Jack cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and bubbly, 45 minutes to 1 hour.

velvety-chocolate-cream-argiro.name: Velvety Chocolate Cream

ingredients.item: A few drops of whipped cream
A few drops of whipped cream

instructions: Add milk, cream, sugar, salt and yolks to a bowl.
Mix very well with wire to homogenize the ingredients and place them in a pot with a thick base.
Stirring constantly on medium heat for 5-6' let the cream thicken and almost begin boiling, careful the cream must not reach the boiling point until it leaves residues on the back of the spoon.
Remove the pot with the hot cream from the heat.
Add the grated chocolate and with rhableder paste to melt and homogenize.
Balance the cream in 4 cups and refrigerate until it stabilizes.
After the chocolate cream is frozen, garnish with whipped cream and some cocoa.

viral-potato-sandwich.name: Viral Potato Sandwich
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss together the potatoes, oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in a bowl until evenly coated.

Arrange the seasoned potato slices in overlapping 6x4 rows on the prepared baking sheet. Sprinkle with the Parmesan cheese. Bake for about 25 minutes, until the potatoes are golden brown and crispy around the edges. Let cool slightly, about 5 minutes.
Spread a thin layer of mustard over each potato slice. Top evenly with the turkey, arugula, tomato, and mozzarella cheese.
Fold the “potato bread” slice over to form a sandwich. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!
